Melee and projectile damage charge this weapon. When fully charged, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to enable a special projectile attack. Projectile final blows create a volatile detonation and grant Volatile Rounds. Improved output efficiency.
  •  Increases shield duration
  •  Slightly increases reload speed
  •  Decreases range This weapon's magazine is built for higher capacity.
  •  Increases magazine size [Alternate Weapon Action]  : When weapon is fully charged, consume charge before firing to make your next shot deploy a protective shield on impact. Passing through the protective shield provides a Void Overshield and improves weapon damage, reload speed, and handling. This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
2535142413.catalystDescription: Defeating a Void-debuffed target grants an overshield.

2694576561.name: Two-Tailed Fox
2694576561.perkDescription:
Shoots two rockets, one Void and one Solar, that can track onto the same target. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions. This weapon's launch parameters are particularly stable.
  •  Greatly increases stability
  •  Increases blast radius
  •  Decreases projectile speed This weapon's projectiles are particularly light and quick.
  •  Increases projectile speed
  •  Increases reload speed The Void rocket suppresses combatants. The Solar rocket scorches. This weapon has a versatile dual-purpose stock.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.

2232171099.name: Deathbringer
2232171099.perkDescription:
Fires remotely detonated projectiles that drop Void orbs on combatants.
[Shoot]  : Fire; release to detonate. This weapon is optimized for an especially explosive payload.
  •  Greatly increases blast radius
  •  Slightly decreases handling speed
  •  Slightly decreases projectile speed Reduces weight for faster reloads.
  •  Greatly increases reload speed
  •  Decreases stability The further a Void orb falls, the more powerful its detonation becomes. This weapon has a versatile dual-purpose stock.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
2232171099.catalystDescription: Increases how quickly Dark Descent reaches its full potential.

2581676735.name: New Land Beyond
2581676735.perkDescription:
Scoring precision hits increases this weapon's damage until the wielder's defeat.

Massively increases ammo reserves. Sturdy iron sights.
• Increases range.
• Slightly increases handling speed. This weapon can fire longer distances.
  •  Increases range Landing a precision hit substantially increases this weapon's target acquisition, handling, reload speed, and stability for a short duration of time. Faster time to aim down sights. This weapon is especially easy to grip.
  •  Greatly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
2581676735.catalystDescription: While this weapon is at high stacks of Master, new rounds are continually loaded into the magazine, and the benefits from Bullseye Bolster last longer.

4284533075.name: Service of Luzaku
4284533075.perkDescription:
Hitting targets with this weapon builds a restorative charge. Hip firing at allies while this weapon is charged heals them, does not expend ammo, and fills this weapon's magazine from reserves. Rapid healing increases weapon damage and spawns Threadlings from your allies. Ultra-light barrel. 
  •  Greatly increases handling speed
  •  Slightly increases stability This weapon can fire longer distances.
  •  Increases range Final blows with this weapon create a Threadling nest that periodically spawns Threadlings. Final blows with this weapon near an existing Threadling nest create a Threadling instead. This weapon is optimized for recoil control.
  •  Increases stability This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
4284533075.catalystDescription: Nests now mature over time. Fully mature nests can be harvested with [###DestinyNamedSubstitutions.ui_player_action_interact_button###] [###DestinyNamedSubstitutions.ui_player_action_interact_verb###] to grant yourself a held Tangle.

1594120904.name: No Time to Explain
1594120904.perkDescription:
Precision shots and shots against combatants slowed or frozen by Stasis will return to the magazine. Ultra-light barrel. 
  •  Greatly increases handling speed
  •  Slightly increases stability This weapon can fire longer distances.
  •  Increases range At 10 stacks of Rewind Again, a small portal will open, shooting bullets from an alternate timeline version of this weapon. Precision hits extend the portal's duration. Each rapid kill with this weapon progressively increases reload speed for a short time. This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
1594120904.catalystDescription: Projectiles from the time portal shoot more frequently.

3856705927.name: Hawkmoon
3856705927.perkDescription:
Final blows and precision hits with Hawkmoon grant stacks of Paracausal Charge, increasing damage versus combatants. The final round in the magazine greatly increases damage based on the number of stacks. Stowing Hawkmoon on the final round removes this bonus. Balanced barrel. 
  •  Slightly increases range and stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed Faster reload when the magazine is nearly empty. Improved accuracy and range on the opening shot of attack. This weapon is slightly easier to hold and aim.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
3856705927.catalystDescription: Increased magazine size. Grants increased handling, reload speed, and weapon range based on the number of stacks of Paracausal Charge.

1441805468.name: The Navigator
1441805468.perkDescription:
Firing this weapon at an ally grants Woven Mail to both the user and the target. Deals more damage while you have Woven Mail. Barrel optimized for distance.
  •  Greatly increases range
  •  Decreases stability
  •  Slightly decreases handling speed Lightweight, agile battery.
  •  Increases handling speed
  •  Increases reload speed Dealing sustained damage severs the target. This weapon has a versatile dual-purpose stock.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
1441805468.catalystDescription: Special reload and then fire to create a Grapple Tangle at the targeted point.

3664831848.name: Heartshadow
3664831848.perkDescription:
Heavy attacks made with full Sword energy turn you invisible and fire exploding Void projectiles. Increased damage at the cost of sword ammo. Sword Guard has high resistance, but low endurance. Remaining invisible grants this weapon increased damage for a brief duration.

Hitting a target with this weapon's projectiles while Shot in the Dark is active weakens them. Defeating a target with this weapon while Shot in the Dark is active turns you invisible once more. This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.

1234150730.name: Trespasser
1234150730.perkDescription:
Reloading after defeating a target causes the next burst to be a longer, more powerful superburst. Barrel optimized for distance.
  •  Greatly increases range
  •  Decreases stability
  •  Slightly decreases handling speed Rounds ricochet off hard surfaces. 
  •  Increases stability 
  •  Slightly increases range Final blows with Unrepentant superbursts automatically reload your weapon and provide an Unrepentant superburst. This weapon is slightly easier to hold and aim.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
1234150730.catalystDescription: Reloading after defeating a target greatly increases target acquisition and aim down sight speed for a short duration.

2376481550.name: Anarchy
2376481550.perkDescription:
Grenades stick to surfaces and chain Arc bolts to other mines. This weapon's barrel provides faster projectiles and much faster aiming.
  •  Greatly increases handling speed
  •  Increases projectile speed This weapon's projectiles are particularly light and quick.
  •  Increases projectile speed
  •  Increases reload speed Final blows increase ammo meter progress from all sources for a short time. This weapon has a versatile dual-purpose stock.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
2376481550.catalystDescription:
Dealing repeated damage with this weapon inflicts Jolt. 

While amplified, Jolt is applied faster.

2286143274.name: The Huckleberry
2286143274.perkDescription:
Increases rate of fire and recoil while you're holding down the trigger. Final blows dealt with this weapon reload the magazine. Ultra-light barrel. 
  •  Greatly increases handling speed
  •  Slightly increases stability Rounds ricochet off hard surfaces. 
  •  Increases stability

  •  Greatly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
2286143274.catalystDescription: Sustained kinetic damage to a target emits a shockwave that damages any nearby targets.

1201830623.name: Truth
1201830623.perkDescription:
This weapon's rockets have tracking. Lock onto targets when aiming down sights. Landing hits with a full magazine grants ammo and boosts the next magazine with increased tracking strength, stability, fire rate, and cluster bombs. This weapon is optimized for an especially explosive payload.
  •  Greatly increases blast radius
  •  Slightly decreases handling speed

  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
1201830623.catalystDescription: Multiple simultaneous final blows queue up a stacking damage buff. Timer starts on next weapon fire; final blows extend this timer.

940371471.name: Wicked Implement
940371471.perkDescription:
Rapidly landing precision hits causes targets to become slowed. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions. Balanced barrel. 
  •  Slightly increases range and stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon can fire longer distances.
  •  Increases range While Creeping Attrition is active, destroying Stasis crystals or landing precision final blows creates a Stasis shard. The Stasis shard returns to you, and collecting Stasis shards refills the magazine. This stock makes the weapon stable but heavy
  •  Increases stability
  •  Moderately controls recoil
  •  Slightly decreases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
940371471.catalystDescription: Collecting Stasis shards gradually overflows the magazine. | Precision final blows spawn a [Stasis] Stasis crystal at the victim's location.

4017959782.name: Symmetry
4017959782.perkDescription:
This weapon fires full auto.
[Alternate Weapon Action]  : Swap to Arc Seeker mode. Arc Seekers track toward combatants you target. Durable ranged barrel.
  •  Increases range Improves stability. 
  •  Increases stability Final blows and precision hits build up Dynamic Charge. Swapping to Arc Seeker mode increases damage and partially reloads the magazine based on the number of charges. Charged Arc Seeker hits grant, and can spend, Bolt Charge. This weapon has a versatile dual-purpose stock.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
4017959782.catalystDescription: Temporarily increases reload speed and handling after sprinting or while amplified. This effect is improved when you are amplified. | Increases the maximum number of Dynamic Charge stacks.

3413860062.name: The Chaperone
3413860062.perkDescription:
Fires a single-slug precision round. Durable ranged barrel.
  •  Increases range This weapon can fire longer distances.
  •  Increases range Precision final blows and rapid precision hits briefly grant bonus handling, range, rate of fire, and precision damage with this weapon. This weapon is optimized for recoil control.
  •  Increases stability This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
3413860062.catalystDescription: Rapidly landing precision hits will return one round to the magazine.

3049715579.name: Praxic Blade
3049715579.perkDescription:
[Heavy Attack]  : Throw your Praxic Blade, which will seek out multiple targets. Attacking recalls the Blade while it is in flight.
[Heavy Attack]  : Hold to perform a more powerful throw, sending the Blade on a straight path in the direction of your aim. Releasing the button recalls the Blade. While guarding, this Sword converts incoming projectiles into bolts that reflect to where you're aiming. This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it. After three rapid light melee attacks, quickly [Heavy Attack]  to execute a heavy melee combo.

400096939.name: Outbreak Perfected
400096939.perkDescription:
This weapon creates SIVA nanite swarms on rapid hits and precision kills. Weighty barrel extension.
  •  Increases range
  •  Decreases handling speed
  •  Moderately controls recoil This weapon can fire longer distances.
  •  Increases range Precision kills greatly decrease reload time. This weapon does more damage to enemies based on the number of SIVA nanites that attach to them. This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
400096939.catalystDescription: Increases nanite damage. Enemies that die with nanites attached to them generate additional nanites.

1345867570.name: Sweet Business
1345867570.perkDescription:
Larger magazine. Increased accuracy when firing from the hip. Picking up Special or Heavy ammo immediately reloads this weapon. Barrel optimized for recoil reduction.
  •  Increases stability Rounds cause extra damage to combatants' shields and overpenetrate targets. 
  •  Slightly increases range Sustained fire boosts range and rate of fire. This weapon has a versatile dual-purpose stock.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
1345867570.catalystDescription: When this weapon is fully spun up, the flinch from incoming damage is greatly reduced.

4293613902.name: Quicksilver Storm
4293613902.perkDescription:
Landing multiple hits turns your next shot into a homing micro-missile. Balanced barrel. 
  •  Slightly increases range and stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed Shots from this weapon knock the target back farther.
  •  Slightly increases range Landing multiple Missile Tracers loads a grenade. [Alternate Weapon Action]  to switch into Grenade Launcher mode. This weapon is optimized for recoil control.
  •  Increases stability This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
4293613902.catalystDescription: This weapon's damage type becomes Strand. Final blows with grenades from this weapon create Tangles.

3413860063.name: Lord of Wolves
3413860063.perkDescription:
Fires a powerful short-range burst of Solar damage. Stable barrel attachment.
  •  Increases stability
  •  Moderately controls recoil
  •  Slightly decreases handling speed This weapon has a greatly increased magazine size, but reloads much slower.
  •  Greatly increases magazine size
  •  Greatly decreases reload speed
  •  Increases airborne effectiveness When firing from the hip, this weapon shoots in full auto and damage and rate of fire are increased, but accuracy and range are decreased. This weapon has a versatile dual-purpose stock.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
3413860063.catalystDescription: Increases reload speed and stability. While Release the Wolves is active, damaging targets with this weapon applies Scorch. When aiming down sights, defeating a target spreads Scorch to those nearby.

1111334348.name: Ice Breaker
1111334348.perkDescription:
Final blows or assists with any other weapon or ability have a chance to create ammo for Ice Breaker. Defeating powerful combatants will create multiple rounds. Balanced barrel. 
  •  Slightly increases range and stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon can fire longer distances.

  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.

1202007252.name: Whirling Ovation
1202007252.perkDescription:
[Shoot]  : Hold to charge; release to fire.
Charged projectiles have a delayed Solar payload. This weapon's launch barrel is optimized for projectile speed.
  •  Greatly increases projectile speed
  •  Decreases stability
  •  Slightly decreases blast radius Slower-building charge for higher damage.
  •  Increases impact damage
  •  Slower charge time The charge speed of this weapon's next shot slowly increases over time. Anticipation builds more quickly as you deal more damage with other weapons. This weapon has a versatile dual-purpose stock.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
1202007252.catalystDescription: Fully charged shots over-penetrate weaker combatants and cause a delayed Solar detonation with a brief scorching field.

1331482397.name: MIDA Multi-Tool
1331482397.perkDescription:
This weapon boosts movement speed. Radar stays active while aiming down sights. Balanced barrel.

  •  Slightly increases handling speed Shots from this weapon knock the target back farther.
  •  Slightly increases range Final blows periodically apply modifications to this weapon, providing additional stats and benefits per modification:
  •  Chip: Faster handling and aim speed
  •  Barrel: Bonus range and stability
  •  Optics: Improved target acquisition
  •  Ammo: Shots detonate on impact This weapon is optimized for recoil control.
  •  Increases stability This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
1331482397.catalystDescription: Gain enhanced radar resolution and increased reload speed when combatants are in close proximity.

4124984448.name: Hard Light
4124984448.perkDescription:
Rounds fired from this weapon have reduced damage falloff, overpenetrate targets, and ricochet off hard surfaces. Projectile damage increases after bounce. Barrel optimized for recoil reduction.
  •  Increases stability Faster reload when the magazine is nearly empty. [Alternate Weapon Action]  : Changes this weapon's damage type, cycling between Void, Arc, and Solar. Grants this weapon temporarily increased damage when you apply or gain an elemental buff or debuff that matches this weapon's damage type. This weapon has a versatile dual-purpose stock.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
4124984448.catalystDescription: This weapon gains reload speed, handling, and aim down sight speed when you are amplified, radiant, or have Devour.

17096506.name: Dragon's Breath
17096506.perkDescription:
Rockets embed themselves in struck targets and periodically eject incendiary fuel that inflicts Scorch. The longer this weapon goes without firing, the more fuel the next rocket contains. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions. This weapon is optimized for an especially explosive payload.
  •  Greatly increases blast radius
  •  Slightly decreases handling speed
  •  Slightly decreases projectile speed This weapon's explosives are more effective.
  •  Slightly increases blast radius
  •  Decreases stability Igniting nearby targets partially replenishes fuel. This weapon refills itself from reserves upon gaining maximum fuel. This weapon is especially easy to grip.
  •  Greatly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
17096506.catalystDescription: This weapon replenishes its fuel faster. Defeating targets with this weapon causes them to periodically drop Firesprites.

3211806999.name: Izanagi's Burden
3211806999.perkDescription:
[Alternate Weapon Action]  : Consume the magazine and load a round with additional range and damage. Stable barrel attachment.
  •  Increases stability
  •  Moderately controls recoil
  •  Slightly decreases handling speed This weapon can fire longer distances.
  •  Increases range Aiming this weapon for a short period reduces flinch. This weapon has a versatile dual-purpose stock.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
3211806999.catalystDescription: Increases the damage bonus of Honed Edge when four bullets are consumed.

2603483885.name: Cloudstrike
2603483885.perkDescription:
Precision final blows generate a lightning bolt at the target's location and grant a moderate amount of Bolt Charge. Ultra-light barrel. 
  •  Greatly increases handling speed
  •  Slightly increases stability Faster reload when the magazine is nearly empty. Rapid precision hits create a lightning storm at the point of impact and grant a stack of Bolt Charge. This weapon is optimized for recoil control.
  •  Increases stability This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
2603483885.catalystDescription: Rapidly landing precision hits will return one round to the magazine.

2130065553.name: Arbalest
2130065553.perkDescription:
Fires slugs that cause massive damage to combatant shields. Strong against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions. Weighty barrel extension.
  •  Increases range
  •  Decreases handling speed
  •  Moderately controls recoil Distance optimizations.
  •  Increases range Breaking an enemy's shield with this weapon makes them more vulnerable to Kinetic damage for a brief period. This weapon has a versatile dual-purpose stock.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
2130065553.catalystDescription: Breaking a combatant's shield with this weapon fills its magazine from reserves. Energy weapons regenerate ammo on hit when matching the damage type to the combatant's shield.

331231237.name: Finality's Auger

[Alternate Weapon Action]  to fire a special projectile that deploys a Ruinscribe Turret. This projectile costs 3 ammo to fire. Aim the projectile skyward to provide the clearest sight lines for the turret which will automatically shoot at nearby targets. Lightly vented barrel.
  •  Greatly controls recoil
  •  Increases handling speed Improves stability. 
  •  Increases stability While a Ruinscribe Turret is deployed, this weapon can paint targets with its laser projectiles. The turret prioritizes painted targets and fires more powerful munitions at them. [Alternate Weapon Action]  to swap between normal fire and laser fire modes. This weapon is especially easy to grip.
  •  Greatly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
331231237.catalystDescription: Deal damage with all equipped weapons within a short time to give this weapon a damage boost.

3761898871.name: Lorentz Driver
3761898871.perkDescription:
This weapon marks targets with an automated targeting system. Final blows on marked targets generate a telemetry pattern. Collecting a telemetry pattern grants ammo to this weapon. Collecting 3 telemetry patterns without dying grants this weapon bonus damage for a long duration and refills the magazine. Lightly vented barrel.
  •  Greatly controls recoil
  •  Increases handling speed Strong battery life.
  •  Increases magazine size A precision final blow with this weapon creates an implosion that pulls in nearby targets and damages them with an additional detonation. This weapon has a versatile dual-purpose stock.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.

3561203890.name: Tessellation
3561203890.perkDescription:
This [weapon|instrument|topology] adapts its damage type to match your equipped grenade. Final blows grant grenade and Transcendence energy. Barrel optimized for recoil reduction.
  •  Increases stability Distance optimizations.
  •  Increases range [Alternate Weapon Action] : Consume your grenade to load a large [projectile|shape|language] that generates an elemental explosion on impact and deals increased damage while Transcendence is active. This weapon has a versatile dual-purpose stock.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
3561203890.catalystDescription: Targets near the blast of Property: Irreducible are [afflicted|burdened|cursed] with an elemental effect matching your equipped grenade's damage type.

3628991659.name: Vigilance Wing

  •  Slightly increases handling speed Faster reload when the magazine is nearly empty. Improved weapon performance and greatly increased recovery when its wielder is the last living member of a fireteam. This weapon has a versatile dual-purpose stock.

  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
3628991659.catalystDescription: Improved handling and reload speed when allies are nearby.

374573733.name: Delicate Tomb
374573733.perkDescription:
Fires a wide horizontal spread when shot from the hip.
Final blows with this weapon have a chance to generate Ionic Traces. Powerful foes and opposing Guardians always generate Ionic Traces. Ultra-light barrel. 
  •  Greatly increases handling speed
  •  Slightly increases stability Slower-building charge for higher damage.

1833195496.catalystDescription: [Alternate Weapon Action]  : Drain Super energy, overflowing the magazine and empowering the beam with bonus damage and the ability to slow and freeze targets until the magazine or Super energy runs out, or the weapon is stowed. Can only be activated when Super energy is full.

3505113722.name: Collective Obligation
3505113722.perkDescription:
This weapon stores Void debuffs when damaging foes, leeching them directly when the target is suppressed, weakened, or volatile. Once charged, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to cause damage from this weapon and to apply the stored debuffs. Lightly vented barrel.
  •  Greatly controls recoil
  •  Increases handling speed Optimized for fast reloading.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Greatly increases reload speed This weapon's magazine is automatically reloaded when you gain Devour, a Void overshield, or become invisible. This weapon is optimized for recoil control.

3505113722.catalystDescription: Defeating a Void-debuffed target grants an overshield.

1681583613.name: Ergo Sum
1681583613.perkDescription:
Final blows with this weapon grant stacks of Gathering Light, improving guard stats and lunge range.
Stowing this weapon consumes all stacks, granting melee, grenade, and class ability energy. Increased sword damage and ammo. Sword Guard has high resistance, but low endurance. Heavy attack deploys a shockwave uppercut and launches the user into the air.
An immediate follow-up swing after the uppercut deploys a homing strike that aggressively seeks a target. This weapon collects less ammo. Final blows with this weapon accelerate Light and Darkness mastery.
Deals increased damage while Transcendent; defeating targets lengthens Transcendence. This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
1681583613.catalystDescription: Dealing damage with a Transcendent grenade grants Ergo Sum ammo.

2069224589.name: One Thousand Voices
2069224589.perkDescription:
Charging this weapon unleashes a giant continuous beam of death. Weighty barrel extension.
  •  Increases range
  •  Decreases handling speed
  •  Moderately controls recoil Slower-building charge for higher damage.
  •  Increases impact damage
  •  Slower charge time This weapon's beam superheats its targets upon impact, causing delayed scorching explosions. This stock makes the weapon stable but heavy
  •  Increases stability
  •  Moderately controls recoil
  •  Slightly decreases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
2069224589.catalystDescription: The weapon has become partially Taken. Detonations produce Taken energy that aggressively seeks out nearby targets and Blights them.

3725585710.name: Lodestar
3725585710.perkDescription:
This weapon fires a low-intensity Arc beam with enhanced stability and accuracy. Ultra-light barrel.

  •  Slightly increases stability When aiming down sights, the beam is compressed into short, high-energy bursts that interact with targets affected by Arc debuffs, dealing increased damage and causing them to detonate into blinding explosions on final blows. Dealing Arc damage from any source aligns the battery's coils. When alignment is complete, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to disengage the safety and enable hip-fired Starlight Beam to apply Jolt to any targets damaged for a short time.  Aim down sights to slow the rate at which the battery drains. This weapon has a versatile dual-purpose stock.
  •  Slightly increases stability
  •  Slightly increases handling speed This weapon tracks the number of enemies you defeated with it.
3725585710.catalystDescription: While amplified, this weapon gains greatly increased reload speed, aim assist, and movement while aiming down sights.

3766045777.name: Black Talon

3766045777.catalystDescription: Dealing damage to Void debuffed targets increases this weapon's damage for a short time per each type of Void debuff affecting the target.

Final blows or rapid hits with this weapon's frontal blades heal you and provide Soulfire Charges, which cause rounds fired by this weapon to inflict potent corruption. These frontal blades deal increased damage to targets afflicted by corruption. [###DestinyNamedSubstitutions.ui_player_action_melee_uncharged_button###] [###DestinyNamedSubstitutions.ui_player_action_melee_uncharged_verb###] : Perform a melee attack using this weapon's frontal blades. Capable of performing a swift two-hit combo. Ultra-light barrel.
